zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthe de Tosny於1002年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼時，她的父親Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches42歲，母親Judith de Bayeux40歲。她於大約1023年與Guy de Laval在法國哈帕格-亞登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1090年享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Berthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthe de Tosny was born in 1002, in Tosny, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches, was 42 and her mother, Judith de Bayeux, was 40. She married Guy de Laval about 1023, in Champagne-Ardenne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1090, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthe de Tosny est née en 1002, à Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Judith de Bayeux, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Laval environ 1023, à Champagne-Ardenne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1090, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthe de Tosny 1002 in Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches 42 und ihre Mutter Judith de Bayeux 40. Sie hat um 1023 in Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich Guy de Laval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1090 im Alter von 88 Jahren.

Lei sposato Guy de Laval circa 1023, nel Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1090, all'età di 88 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Berthe de Tosny(이)가 1002년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 토스니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith de Bayeux(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1023년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니에서 Guy de Laval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1090년 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Tosny nasceu em 1002, em Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Bayeux, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy de Laval aproximadamente 1023, em Champagne-Ardenne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1090, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthe de Tosny родилась в 1002 г. в местности тосни, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Judith de Bayeux, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Laval около 1023 г. в местности чампагне-арденн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1090 г. в возрасте 88 лет.

Se casó con Guy de Laval aproximadamente 1023, en Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1090, a la edad de 88 años.
